reason: Extreme Sentiment Detected (Score: 10/10): The reports of a strike damaging 17% of Qatar's LNG capacity for 3-5 years constitutes a massive, long-term global supply shock. This represents an extreme black swan event for the Natural Gas market, likely resulting in explosive price volatility and market panic.

payload.summary: The reports of a strike damaging 17% of Qatar's LNG capacity for 3-5 years constitutes a massive, long-term global supply shock. This represents an extreme black swan event for the Natural Gas market, likely resulting in explosive price volatility and market panic.
